title: Kala Shah Kala
desc: Lovely, a man with a dark complexion, gets married to Pammi, a beautiful girl. However, his bliss is short-lived as Pammi appears to be possessed by a spirit.

title: Raazi
desc: As diplomatic tensions rise in 1971, a daring Kashmiri woman walks the tightrope between marriage and duty, delving into the shadows of espionage to protect her motherland.

title: Har Har Mahadev
desc: Lord Shiva, an ascetic, and Goddess Shakti create the cosmos together. They separate for creation's sake, but reunite when she is reborn as Goddess Parvati.

title: Crime Stories
desc: The host presents dramatised re-enactments of real-life criminal incidents that revolve around harassment, murder and kidnappings.
